rules.statement: Autonomous agents MUST NOT modify files outside their assigned autonomy lane.
All non-trivial autonomous decisions MUST produce an inspectable trace in the Decision Log.
The RemediationMap MUST NOT dispatch any entry whose confidence value is below 0.80. Entries below this threshold MUST NOT produce Proposals regardless of their status field.

The ConservationGate MUST reject any LLM-produced code whose logical token preservation ratio falls below 0.50 of the original, unless the invoking Proposal explicitly declares deletions_authorized=True.
The PlannerAgent MUST explicitly reference its governing quality assurance policy.

scope.notes: Scoped to PlannerAgent only — the sole autonomous component responsible for policy-aligned planning decisions.
